top_analogues.name: 2022_europe_gas_crisis_global_rate_hikes
differential_diagnosis: headline_inflation: 3.4% today vs 9.8% peak in 2022 (LARGEST gap)
growth: 6.9% India domestic vs 1.0% global in 2022
top_analogues.implication: policy response should be milder; equity drawdown shallower; oil-channel intact but financial-tightening channel half as severe

top_analogues.name: 1991_india_bop_crisis
differential_diagnosis: FX reserves: ~10 months cover today vs <2 weeks in 1991
currency regime: flexible today vs fixed
banking system: multi-year-high asset quality today vs low transparency 1991
top_analogues.implication: shock pattern rhymes; financial-system outcome will not — India has buffers 1991 lacked
